title: Pooled Registered Pension Plan (PRPP) contribution receipt return - Canada.ca
content:
## Pooled Registered Pension Plan (PRPP) contribution receipt return
An administrator of a pooled registered pension plan (PRPP) must file an information return for the PRPP contributions made by the employee or the employer under the plan in a contribution year.
- Contribution year Find out how to determine the PRPP contribution year for contributions made by employees and employers.
- Reporting PRPP contributions Find out what should be included on the PRPP receipt and how to report PRPP contributions.
- Due date Find out when you must file the return for a contribution year.
- Pooled Registered Pension Plan (PRPP) - information for individuals
- The Pooled Registered Pension Plan (PRPP)

### Give feedback about this page
